programs.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programs.desc: Rick Stein reaches the mid-point of his meander through France, reaching Burgundy.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programs.desc: Rick arrives in Perigord, famous for black truffles, walnuts and dishes cooked with duck.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programs.desc: Rick Stein continues his trip through France, ending his journey at the Mediterranean.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programs.desc: Rick Stein's journey takes him to Languedoc before finally crossing over to Provence.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programs.desc: Rick Stein samples swimmer crabs cooked with green peppercorns.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programs.desc: Rick delights in the varied and delicious street food of Hanoi.
